holes.name: LeanEval.Geometry.PlatonicClassification.platonic_classification
holes.body:
/-- **Platonic classification.** `p = (p_2, p_3, p_4, p_5, …) = (∞, 5, 6, 3, 3, 3, …)`. -/
theorem platonic_classification :
    platonicCount 2 = ⊤ ∧
      platonicCount 3 = 5 ∧
        platonicCount 4 = 6 ∧
          ∀ d, 5 ≤ d → platonicCount d = 3 := by
  sorry
